title: Ashrei: The Psalm Recited Three Times Daily
title_he: אשרי: המזמור הנאמר שלוש פעמים ביום
description: Why Psalm 145 holds such a central place in Jewish prayer — its acrostic structure, its promises, and the missing letter nun.
description_zh: 为什么《诗篇》145篇在犹太祈祷中占据如此核心的地位——它的离合诗结构、它的承诺和缺失的字母nun。
description_he: מדוע תהילים קמ"ה מחזיק מקום כה מרכזי בתפילה היהודית — מבנה האקרוסטיכון שלו, הבטחותיו והאות הנון החסרה.
cultural_parallels: Three daily prayer times similar to Buddhist/Daoist practice (三时)
Alphabetic acrostic structure similar to Chinese hidden-head poetry (藏头诗)
Repetitive practice as formation similar to Confucian ritual (礼)
Chinese historical periods: Han Dynasty (汉朝) for Second Temple period, Song Dynasty (宋朝) for medieval rabbis

historical_periods.composition: First Temple Period (957-586 BCE) / Spring and Autumn Period China (春秋时代)
historical_periods.liturgical_elevation: Late Second Temple / Early Rabbinic (1st-2nd century CE) / Han Dynasty China (汉朝)
historical_periods.talmudic_formalization: 200-500 CE / Three Kingdoms-Jin Dynasty China (三国-晋朝)
